name: Constricting Meteor
description:
The weights of this +1 striking meteor hammer are shaped like snake heads, and anaconda scales adorn the chain.

Activate—Coiling Chain 1 (concentrate)

Requirements Your last action was a successful melee Strike or with the constricting meteor

Effect The chain of the meteor hammer wraps around the target and squeezes. Attempt an Athletics check to the creature with a +1 item bonus. In addition to being on a success, the target takes ] damage.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include the scales of a giant anaconda.
